2117630.name: Fantasy Grounds - Amulet at Watcher's Pool
2117630.description:
Amulet at Watcher's Pool 5E

By: T.M. van Dalen RPG
Rescue a powerful amulet from the clutches of an evil cult in this adventure for fifth edition!
This one-shot adventure for 4th level characters will bring your party into the dangerous Spiritlands, a deserted area in Freebone Vale. There, a group of cultists that have split off from the Church of Enas have managed to take over a temple. Can you recover the
amulet of the watcher before it's too late?
Amulet at Watcher's Pool is a 4-6 hour adventure for Tier 1 Characters (optimized for APL 4). 
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Sandra Koch, and Tim Dalen
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and the included 5E Compatible ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
